title: Vance says 'a lot' of Iran deal details to figure out, but U.S. has 'all the cards'
summary_full: Vance on CNBC's "Squawk Box" expressed confidence that America has "all the cards" in subsequent talks with Iran.
summary_public: Vance on CNBC's "Squawk Box" expressed confidence that America has "all the cards" in subsequent talks with Iran.
